title: Xtra Flaky Spanish Almond Empanadas
description: These empanadas are a kid-friendly Spanish dish featuring filo pastry and almonds, making them a delicious and fun treat for the whole family. They are also gluten-free friendly.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the sliced almonds, granulated sugar, and cinnamon.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the melted score-fat, eggs, and vanilla extract.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
Unroll the filo pastry and cut it into 8 equal squares.
Place a tablespoon of the almond mixture onto the center of each square.
Fold the squares in half to form triangles and press the edges together to seal.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with a little bit of melted score-fat.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20 minutes.
